description: 遮擋／角度／可見性實驗 — 與 gap_baseline 同一批 data，額外詢問是否因視角而非未配戴

queries.name: helmet_visibility_limited
queries.prompt: Is the safety helmet or hard hat hard to see or not clearly visible mainly because of camera angle, the worker facing away from the camera, occlusion by equipment/body/hose, distance, or poor image quality — rather than the image clearly showing the worker is not wearing a helmet? Answer yes or no first, then explain briefly.

queries.name: mask_visibility_limited
queries.prompt: Is the face mask or respirator hard to see or not clearly visible mainly because of camera angle, facing direction, occlusion, distance, or image quality — rather than the image clearly showing the worker is not wearing a mask or respirator? Answer yes or no first, then explain briefly.

filter.description: 只處理：detect person > 0 且（detect helmet = 0 或 missing_helmet=yes 或 missing_face_mask=yes）— 與 PPE 不確定相關的幀
